data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): create story, claim, transition in_progress closed -> exit 0 with no --verdict-hash/--force-close. Yet rebar help transition says "story/epic close requires --verdict-hash (or --force-close=<reason>)" and ticket-transition.sh:38 usage says "Required when closing story/epic tickets".

Source: ticket_txn.py:102-114 — gate only fires when verify.require_verdict_for_close=true in .rebar/config.conf (default false, opt-in per commit abb6f23); misleading text at rebar:94 and ticket-transition.sh:38.

Fix: reword help to "required when verify.require_verdict_for_close is enabled". Doc-only; RED test optional (string assert).
data.title: Help claims story/epic close 'requires --verdict-hash' but the gate is opt-in (default off)
